tweets: Edward Sturm published a test on YouTube claiming FAQ schema no longer moves the needle for SEO. His data shows no meaningful ranking or CTR lift. #SEO #SchemaMarkup #TechnicalSEO

Caveat. This is a single test from one creator, not a large scale study. Still, it lines up with what many have seen since Google rolled back FAQ rich results in 2023. Worth retesting on your own pages before deciding.

text: Shift in Google's local algorithm worth knowing. Brand prominence matters less. Profile interactions matter more. Photo views, review reads, Q and A clicks, website visits. Engagement beats reputation now. #LocalSEO #SEO #GoogleMaps

Fresh data point on local SEO citations in 2026. Five citations from authoritative industry directories rank better than 30 citations from low quality local directories. Quality beats quantity, still. #LocalSEO #SEO #Citations

Google Business Profile now ships scheduling and multi location publishing for Posts. If you run a chain or multi location brand, this is a real workflow upgrade. #LocalSEO #GoogleBusinessProfile #SmallBusiness

Uncomfortable 2026 local SEO truth. Google's AI Overviews pull from Business Profiles and favor professional photography. iPhone photos get skipped. Your camera roll is now an SEO input. #LocalSEO #SEO #AIOverviews
